name: CREDITRISKMONITOR COM INC
summary: CreditRiskMonitor.com, Inc. (CRMZ) is a SaaS company providing web-based commercial credit risk analytics and monitoring tools. Its primary products, CreditRiskMonitor and SupplyChainMonitor, offer bankruptcy prediction scores (FRISK for public companies, 96% accurate; PAYCE for private companies, 80% accurate), commercial credit reports, financial spreads, trade payment data, and curated news alerts. Subscribers include nearly 40% of the Fortune 1000, using the platform to manage trade credit risk, supplier financial risk, and counterparty relationships globally.

products.name: CreditRiskMonitor
products.description: SaaS platform for corporate credit professionals featuring FRISK/PAYCE scores, commercial credit reports, trade payment data, financial spreads, and counterparty risk dashboards.

products.name: SupplyChainMonitor
products.description: SaaS risk management platform for procurement and supply chain professionals featuring supplier financial risk analytics, location mapping, weather/disaster overlays, and customizable alerts.

products.name: FRISK Score
products.description: Proprietary bankruptcy prediction score for public companies, 96% accurate at least three months before filing, incorporating subscriber sentiment signals.

products.name: PAYCE Score
products.description: Proprietary bankruptcy prediction score for private companies, 80% accurate within a one-year horizon.

partnerships.description: Contractual agreements to redistribute NRSRO agency ratings within CreditRiskMonitor.com platforms.
Use of FFIEC call report data for U.S. bank financial reports on the platform.
